prompt_inputs.goal: Match day performance and recovery for professional soccer

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals plus pre/during/post-match nutrition
Includes balanced macronutrients (carbs for energy, protein for recovery, moderate fat) appropriate for match day
Features quick-digesting carbohydrate sources and hydration strategies for sustained performance
Realistic, compact format suitable for a professional athlete's daily schedule
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific athlete (professional soccer player) balancing moderate macronutrient ratios with hydration needs and quick energy sources for match day performance

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with high carbohydrate intake for sustained energy and recovery

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals plus snacks for one full day
Emphasizes carbohydrate-rich foods appropriate for endurance athlete (minimum 6-10g carbs per kg body weight)
Includes timing considerations for pre/during/post-training nutrition
Respects vegetarian diet and nut-free restrictions throughout all meals
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and sustained energy throughout training and recovery

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and increase strength through weightlifting with optimal protein distribution and pre/post-workout nutrition

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day with high protein content (minimum 1.6g per kg bodyweight)
Includes specific pre-workout and post-workout meals with appropriate timing and macronutrient composition
Total daily calories support muscle building goals for an 85kg strength athlete
Presented in compact, easy-to-read format suitable for a single day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing high protein distribution and caloric density for muscle building with specific meal timing around workouts
